title: Kev sib txuas lus hauv tib neeg
subtitle: Kev sib tham ntawm lub sijhawm tiag tiag
clickMic: Nyem lub microphone pib hais lus
enableMic: Pib kev sib kho kom pab tau lub microphone
noTranslations: Kev txhais lus yuav tshwm sim ntawm no

startModal.title: Pib Kev Sib Tham Hauv Tus Kheej?

translationFailed: Kev txhais lus ua tsis tiav

waitingDesc: Thov tos ntawm no. Koj qhov Kev Sib Tham Hauv Tus Kheej yuav pib tau txais thaum koj tus kws qhia ntawv sib txuas.
